author: y4rr
content: [result] Added MultiplicativeLR (compounds lr*=f(epoch) each step, 6 tests) and ChainedScheduler (applies all inner schedulers in sequence each step, 6 tests). The other 4 requested schedulers (PolynomialLR, SequentialLR, SWALR, OneCycleLR) already existed. 95 scheduler tests pass.
